programme.title: A Fistful Of Dollars, (1967, Action)
programme.desc: The Man With No Name (Clint Eastwood) receives offers from two gangs terrorizing a small town and accepts both, setting in motion a plan to destroy the criminals in a series of brilliantly orchestrated setups, showdowns, and deadly confrontations.

programme.title: A-X-L, (2018, Science fiction)
programme.desc: A.X.L. is a top-secret, robotic dog created by the military to help protect tomorrow's soldiers. Code named by the scientists who created him, A.X.L. stands for Attack, Exploration, Logistics, and embodies next-generation artificial intelligence.

programme.title: Cloverfield, (2007, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Five young New Yorkers face a life or death struggle in order to escape from the city when a monster the size of a skyscraper suddenly appears.

programme.title: The Island, (2005, Action)
programme.desc: A man goes on the run after he discovers that he is actually a "harvested being", and is being kept along with others in a utopian facility.

programme.title: Congo, (1995, Action)
programme.desc: When an explorer’s quest for a diamond mine ends tragically in the Congo, his father and the operation’s CEO sends Dr. Karen Ross, into the jungle to continue the hunt…maybe for his son, but definitely for the diamonds.

programme.title: Push, (2009, Action)
programme.desc: Superhumans defy a government plot to harness and abuse their powers. Chris Evans and Dakota Fanning (the TWILIGHT films) team in a pulse-pounding paranormal thriller.

programme.title: Cloverfield, (2007, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Five young New Yorkers face a life or death struggle in order to escape from the city when a monster the size of a skyscraper suddenly appears.

programme.title: G.I. Joe: The Rise Of Cobra, (2009, Action)
programme.desc: They are G.I. Joe, a top-secret elite strike force featuring the best operatives from around the globe. After a secret weapon is stolen by the evil Cobra, the G.I. Joes must stop Cobra from plunging the world into chaos.

programme.title: G.I. Joe: Retaliation, (2013, Action)
programme.desc: The greatest American Heroes are back and they've been set up to take the fall for a heinous crime they didn't commit. Roadblock (Dwayne Johnson) leads a new team (including Channing Tatum and Bruce Willis) on this high-octane adventure.

programme.title: The Tuxedo, (2002, Action)
programme.desc: Simmy Tong is an ordinary cabbie-turned-chauffeur who slips into a 2-billion-dollar, super-spy suit and inadvertently becomes a dashing secret agent.

programme.title: The Longest Yard, (2005, Comedy)
programme.desc: The story of a pro quarterback and former college champion and coach are asked to put together a football team of inmates to take on the guards while doing their time in prison.

programme.title: Drugstore June, (2024, Dark Humor & Black Comedies)
programme.desc: After the pharmacy in her small town is robbed, a girl who still lives at home with her parents takes matters into her own hands to solve the crime, while at the same time trying to get over her ex-boyfriend and become more of an adult.

programme.title: Ultraviolet, (2006, Action)
programme.desc: Milla Jovovich, Cameron Bright Nick Chinlund and William Fichtner star in this theatrical set in the late 21st century, where some humans have been modified genetically by a vampire-like disease and the world is pushed to the brink of worldwide civil war.

programme.title: The Longest Yard, (2005, Comedy)
programme.desc: The story of a pro quarterback and former college champion and coach are asked to put together a football team of inmates to take on the guards while doing their time in prison.

programme.title: Catch Me If You Can, (2002, Comedy)
programme.desc: From three-time Oscar-winning director Steven Spielberg, Catch Me If You Can follows Frank W. Abagnale, Jr. as he successfully passes himself off as a pilot, a lawyer, and a doctor - all before his 21st birthday!

programme.title: Young Guns, (1988, Action)
programme.desc: In a lawless and violent time, six young outcasts are hired by an English merchant as 'regulators' to guard his ranch against the mob, a corrupt and powerful ring.

programme.title: Young Guns II, (1990, Action)
programme.desc: The West has changed since The Regulators last rode through. Cornered by the ruthless cattle kings and double-crossed by corrupt government officials, Billy the Kid leads the Regulators down a treacherous trail towards Old Mexico… and destiny.

programme.title: The Duel, (2016, Action)
programme.desc: A Texas Ranger (Liam Hemsworth) investigates a series of murders in a small town and uncovers a dark secret about the town's charismatic leader (Woody Harrelson).

programme.title: Earth Girls Are Easy, (1988, Comedy)
programme.desc: Three aliens (Jim Carrey, Damon Wayans, and Jeff Goldblum) crash-land in Los Angeles' San Fernando Valley. A manicurist (Geena Davis) and her boss (the wacky Julie Brown) befriend the threesome, give them makeovers and show them the town.

programme.title: Mac and Me, (1988, Comedy)
programme.desc: A young boy confined to a wheelchair finds a lost alien creature and helps him return to his home and learn many magical things in the process.

programme.title: Cherry 2000, (2017, Action)
programme.desc: What used to be the American Southwest. In this post-MAD MAX Adventureture, a woman mercenary is hired to bust into a 21st-century robot Warehouse which is operated by psychos.

programme.title: The Return of Swamp Thing, (1989, Action)
programme.desc: NEW HD TRANSFER. Everyone's favorite muck-encrusted plant-man falls in love with Dr. Arcane's sexy daughter and must rescue her from her father's nefarious and murderous plans.

programme.title: Desperately Seeking Susan, (2017, Comedy)
programme.desc: A bored New Jersey suburban housewife's fascination with a kooky character she's read about in the personal columns leads to her being mistaken for the woman herself.

programme.title: Eddie and the Cruisers, (1983, Drama)
programme.desc: A reporter begins tracking down rumors of an unreleased album by a rock band whose charismatic leader disappeared after an accident and was presumed dead years before.

programme.title: Evil Dead II, (1987, Supernatural Horror)
programme.desc: Ash, the sole survivor of THE EVIL DEAD, returns to the same cabin in the woods and again unleashes the dead. With his girlfriend possessed and his body parts running amok, Ash must again single-handedly battle the damned in this unhinged horror classic!

programme.title: Cujo, (1983, Horror Classics)
programme.desc: While Donna and Vic Trenton struggle to save their rocky marriage, their son Tad befriends the loveable 200-lb St. Bernard who belongs to their mechanic.

programme.title: Maximum Overdrive, (1986, Horror)
programme.desc: After a mysterious comet turns every machine on Earth into a homicidal rampage device, the survivors at the Dixie Boy Truck Stop are making a stand, and human vengeance goes into overdrive.

programme.title: Stephen King's Silver Bullet, (1985, Horror)
programme.desc: Something is killing off townsfolk in Tarker's Mills. Something ingenious. Something remotely human. But the only person in town with courage to stop this lurking menace is a 13-year-old boy, confined to a wheelchair since birth.

programme.title: The Woman in Black 2: Angel of Death, (2014, Supernatural Horror)
programme.desc: 40 years after the first haunting at Eel Marsh House, a group of children evacuated from WWII London arrives, awakening the house's darkest inhabitant.

programme.title: Feast, (2005, Horror)
programme.desc: Customers locked inside a bar are forced to fight monsters.

programme.title: Winnie-the-Pooh: Blood and Honey, (2022, Horror)
programme.desc: Winnie-The-Pooh: Blood and Honey follows Pooh and Piglet as they go on a rampage after Christopher Robin abandons them.

programme.title: Scouts Guide To The Zombie Apocalypse, (2015, Horror)
programme.desc: When their peaceful town is ravaged by a zombie invasion, three scouts and one badass cocktail waitress will fight for the badge of a lifetime and put their scouting skills to the test to save mankind from the undead.

programme.title: A Message from Brianna, (2021, Horror)
programme.desc: A Message from Brianna

programme.title: The Wolf of Snow Hollow, (2020, Horror)
programme.desc: A small-town sheriff and his lackluster team of officers must solve a series of brutal murders that are occurring on the full moon. As he's consumed by the hunt for the killer, he struggles to remind himself that there's no such thing as werewolves…

programme.title: Alma & the Wolf, (2025, B-Movie Horror)
programme.desc: After a violent animal attack, paranoia spreads through Spiral Creek. But when Deputy Ren Accord gets too close, his son vanishes, and reality begins to fracture.

programme.title: 30 Days of Night, (2007, Vampires)
programme.desc: Josh Hartnett (The Black Dahlia, Pearl Harbor) crosses over to the dark side in this bone-chilling adaptation of the cult-hit graphic novel, brought to the screen in all its demonic glory.

programme.title: 30 Days of Night: Dark Days, (2010, Horror)
programme.desc: Almost a year has passed since Barrow, Alaska’s population was decimated by vampires. Stella, mourning her husband’s murder, has been travelling the world trying to convince others that vampires exist.

programme.title: Feast, (2005, Horror)
programme.desc: Customers locked inside a bar are forced to fight monsters.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood Part II, (1985, Action)
programme.desc: John Rambo is sent on assignment back to Southeast Asia to uncover evidence of still missing POWs, and ends up with his hands full when he comes up against Vietnamese soldiers still guarding the camps.

programme.title: Rambo III, (1988, Action)
programme.desc: Rambo refuses to join his friend and former mentor, Colonel Trautman, on a mission to Afghanistan. The mission fails and Trautman is captured by Russian troops. Now Rambo must infiltrate the Russian fortress to save his only friend.

programme.title: The Delta Force, (1986, Action)
programme.desc: Political extremists have taken innocent people hostage…and only super-soldiers Chuck Norris, Lee Marvin and The Delta Force can rescue them in this explosive adventure filled with wall-to-wall action! Martin Balsam and Shelley Winters also star.

programme.title: First Blood, (1982, Action)
programme.desc: A soft-spoken Vietnam vet drifts into a small town looking for no trouble, but finds it in the form of a psychotic local sheriff who finds pleasure in hating him for no reason.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood Part II, (1985, Action)
programme.desc: John Rambo is sent on assignment back to Southeast Asia to uncover evidence of still missing POWs, and ends up with his hands full when he comes up against Vietnamese soldiers still guarding the camps.

programme.title: Rambo III, (1988, Action)
programme.desc: Rambo refuses to join his friend and former mentor, Colonel Trautman, on a mission to Afghanistan. The mission fails and Trautman is captured by Russian troops. Now Rambo must infiltrate the Russian fortress to save his only friend.

programme.title: Stop Making Sense, (1984, Documentary)
programme.desc: The greatest concert film of all time, filmmaker Jonathan Demme captures Talking Heads and an ecstatic ensemble of musicians at their exhilarating best in this iconic live performance. Newly restored to celebrate its 40th anniversary.

programme.title: Married to the Mob, (1988, Drama)
programme.desc: A mobster's wife hates her lifestyle, but gets a chance to change it when her husband is killed--if the Long Island mob and the FBI let her.

programme.title: Something Wild, (1986, Drama)
programme.desc: A conservative executive accepts a ride with a wild, eccentric woman, who takes him on an outrageous odyssey that turns both their worlds upside down.

programme.title: Operation Condor II: The Armour Of The Gods, (1991, Action)
programme.desc: Jackie Chan is a fortune hunter whose ex-girlfriend is kidnapped by an evil cult! Things kick into high gear when her fiancée, an old friend of Jackie’s, asks him for help in securing the kidnappers’ lone demand: the priceless Armor of The Gods!

programme.title: The Addams Family, (1991, Comedy)
programme.desc: Come join The Addams Family for the most hilarious scarefest of this season or any other! When long-lost Uncle Fester reappears after twenty-five years in the Bermuda Triangle, Gomez and Morticia plan a celebration to wake the dead.

programme.title: The Tuxedo, (2002, Action)
programme.desc: Simmy Tong is an ordinary cabbie-turned-chauffeur who slips into a 2-billion-dollar, super-spy suit and inadvertently becomes a dashing secret agent.

programme.title: Operation Condor, (1991, Action)
programme.desc: Jackie Chan ignites the big screen as the world's greatest secret agent, code name Condor. Sent to track down stolen Nazi gold, he is pursued by a ruthless band of treasure-hunting terrorists on a globe-spanning quest to reach the bounty first!

programme.title: Operation Condor II: The Armour Of The Gods, (1991, Action)
programme.desc: Jackie Chan is a fortune hunter whose ex-girlfriend is kidnapped by an evil cult! Things kick into high gear when her fiancée, an old friend of Jackie’s, asks him for help in securing the kidnappers’ lone demand: the priceless Armor of The Gods!

programme.title: Project Almanac, (2015, Science fiction)
programme.desc: When five teens discover a machine that can send them back in time, the possibilities seem endless. But by changing the past, they have threatened the future of our world. Can they undo the damage they have unleashed before it’s too late?

programme.title: Mission: Impossible, (1996, Action)
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt, a secret agent, is framed for the deaths of his espionage team and attempts to flee government assassins after him. He races against the clock in order to discover the truth.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible II, (2000, Action)
programme.desc: The world's greatest spy, Ethan Hunt, returns and partners up with the beautiful Nyah Hall to stop renegade agent Sean Ambrose from releasing a new kind of terror on an unsuspecting world.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible III, (2006, Action)
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt hurdles into spectacular new adventures from Rome to Shanghai as he races to rescue a captured agent and stop Davian from eliminating his next target, Ethan’s wife.

programme.desc: The FBI and a local cop track various members of organized crime families as they gather for a huge meeting in upstate New York in 1957.

programme.title: Point Break, (1991, Action)

programme.title: Seven Psychopaths, (2012, Dark Humor & Black Comedies)
programme.desc: A struggling screenwriter inadvertently becomes entangled in the Los Angeles criminal underworld after his oddball friends kidnap a gangster's beloved Shih Tzu.

programme.title: Mob Town, (2019, Drama)
programme.desc: The FBI and a local cop track various members of organized crime families as they gather for a huge meeting in upstate New York in 1957.

programme.title: The Big Hit, (1998, Action)
programme.desc: Lou Diamond Phillips, Mark Wahlberg, Christina Applegate, Antonio Sabato Jr. and Lela Rochon star in this story of a hitman who kidnaps the teenage child of his boss.

programme.title: The Professional, (1994, Action)
programme.desc: The mysterious Leon (Jean Reno) is New York's top hitman. When his next-door neighbors are murdered, Leon becomes the unwilling guardian of the family's sole survivor - 12-year-old Mathilda (Natalie Portman). Rating:R

programme.title: Seven Psychopaths, (2012, Dark Humor & Black Comedies)
programme.desc: A struggling screenwriter inadvertently becomes entangled in the Los Angeles criminal underworld after his oddball friends kidnap a gangster's beloved Shih Tzu.

programme.title: The Farewell, (2019, Drama)
programme.desc: In this funny, heartfelt story, Billi's (Awkwafina) family returns to China under the guise of a fake wedding to stealthily say goodbye to their beloved matriarch—the only person that doesn't know she only has a few weeks to live.

programme.title: Past Lives, (2023, Romance)
programme.desc: Nora & Hae Sung, two deeply connected childhood friends, are wrest apart after Nora's family emigrates from South Korea. Decades later, they are reunited for one fateful week as they confront destiny, love, and the choices that make a life.

programme.title: In The Mood For Love, (2001, Romance)
programme.desc: Two neighbors form a strong bond after both suspect extramarital activities of their spouses. However, they agree to keep their bond platonic so as not to commit similar wrongs.

programme.title: Son of Rambow, (2008, Comedy)
programme.desc: A hilariously fresh take on friendship, family, film heroes and the death-defying adventures of growing up in the video age.

programme.title: Sing Street, (2016, Musical)

programme.title: Airplane!, (1980, Comedy)

programme.title: Stepmom, (1998, Drama)
programme.desc: An unlikely friendship develops when a mother of two is forced to teach another woman to raise her kids. Julia Roberts and Susan Sarandon star.

programme.title: Zoro, Sanji, and Brook continue their search for the samurai, Trafalgar tries to sneak Chopper into the laboratory, and Luffy boldly challenges the Master!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Capture M! The Pirate Alliance's Operation Launches!

programme.title: Luffy's battle with his old nemesis Smoker is interrupted by the arrival of a terrifying toxic blob – and the evil genius who created the monster!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: On the Verge of Annihilation! A Deadly Monster Comes Flying In!

programme.title: The Straw Hats make a valiant push to capture Caesar Clown - Luffy matches his Armament Haki with Clown's powerful Gas-Gas Fruit powers! The battle turns in favor of the Straw Hats, but underestimating Clown's abilities may have deadly consequences!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: An Intense Battle! Caesar Exercises His True Power!

programme.title: Trafalgar Law finds trouble in the form of an old acquaintance, Chopper investigates the Master's lab, and the mysterious Samurai shows what he can do with a full body!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Samurai Who Can Cut Fire! Foxfire Kin'emon!

programme.title: The Master gathers his young test subjects, shocking secret identities are finally revealed, and the poisonous purple blob continues its march across the island!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Shocking! The True Identity of the Mystery Man Vergo!

programme.title: Nami and Usopp get an unexpected helping hand in their fight to save the children, Chopper plots a daring escape attempt, and the Master markets his greatest weapon!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Save the Children! The Master's Evil Hands Close In!

programme.title: A desperate need for candy leads the children to return to the lab, and Caesar plans to show the world the new and improved version of Smiley!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Shaking Up the New World! Caesar's Horrendous Experiment!

programme.title: Luffy and the Straw Hats find themselves pursued by a deadly cloud of purple gas that turns everything living thing in its path into petrified statues of ash!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Deadliest Weapon of Mass Destruction in History! Shinokuni!

programme.title: Law's got a trick up his sleeve that could mean the difference between life and death. Zoro and company reunite with Nami and Sanji, but can they reach safety before being swallowed by a poisonous cloud?!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Launching the Counter Attack! Luffy and Law’s Great Escape!

programme.title: Finally reunited and returned to their proper bodies, the Straw Hats fall in line as Luffy and Law lead the charge to settle the score with Caesar – and save the children!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Get to Building R! The Pirate Alliance's Great Advance

programme.title: Caesar hatches a plan to forever silence his enemies, Chopper races through the compound in search of the drugged children, and Tashigi's men make the ultimate sacrifice!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Tashigi's Tears! G-5's Desperate Breakthrough Plan!

programme.title: Luffy races toward Caesar in the hopes of delivering a beating, Sanji saves a damsel in distress, and Chopper tries to prevent the children from eating the drugged candy!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Treacherous Vice Admiral! Demon Bamboo Vergo!

programme.title: Sanji and Vergo slug it out in a cloud of toxic gas, Law finds the room that could ruin the New World, and Luffy hopes to bring Caesar's reign of terror to a brutal end!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Fierce Battle Gets Heated! Luffy vs. Caesar!

programme.title: With Law's true ambitions revealed, Doflamingo goes into action in order to protect his criminal operation! Caesar slips away from Luffy leaving him to face off with the frigid Monet, and the rest of the crew face down a menacing dragon!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Mastermind Underground! Doflamingo Makes His Move!

programme.title: Luffy goes down fast after Monet puts a chill into him, and Trafalgar Law makes a desperate attempt to reclaim his heart during an electric battle with Vergo!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Luffy Dies from Exposure?! The Spine-chilling Snow Woman Monet!

programme.title: Smoker attacks Vergo for assaulting his men, Luffy meets something strange in the trash heap, and a flashback reveals the true depths of Caesar's madness!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Fists Collide! A Battle of the Two Vice Admirals!

programme.title: Luffy befriends a dragon that used to be a human boy, and Captain Smoker continues his brutal battle with the villainous Vergo!
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Luffy hitches a ride on a dragon, Mocha tries to keep the Master's candy away from her friends, and Zoro pits his steel against snow in a battle with Monet!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Deadly Fight in a Blizzard! The Straw Hats vs. the Snow Woman!

programme.title: It's Zoro vs. Monet in a duel to the death - or is it? Tashigi comes to lend a hand, and she'll need to bring her full might to compensate for Zoro's weakness! Meanwhile, Mocha is running out of options for keeping the candy away from the children.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Showing Off His Techniques! Zoro's Formidable One-Sword Style!

programme.title: Chopper, Nami, and Robin watch in horror as Mocha makes a heartbreaking sacrifice in a courageous attempt to save the lives of her friends!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: To Save Her Friends! Mocha Runs at the Risk of Her Life!

programme.title: Brownbeard heroically attempts to expose Caesar as a villain, the horrific truth about Punk Hazard is finally revealed, and Luffy puts the hurt on his gaseous enemy!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Brownbeard in Grief! Luffy Lands a Furious Blow!

programme.title: Luffy makes Caesar pay for his crimes against the children, and Smoker risks his life for a chance to see Vergo fall in battle!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Surprising Outcome! White Chase vs. Vergo!

programme.title: Law reaches the end of his epic battle with Vergo, and Luffy looks to land a devastating final blow on the murderous gasbag Caesar!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Caesar's Defeat! The Powerful Grizzly Magnum!

programme.title: Word of Luffy and Law's alliance spreads throughout the world, Chopper and Brook race to stay ahead of the deadly gas, and Joker sends a team to rescue Caesar!
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: The laboratory crumbling around them, and time running out, Luffy, the Straw Hats, the G-5, the children and all the others make a final desperate sprint towards the one exit left off the island - but Joker has one more trick up his sleeve.
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: As the Straw Hats and company flee the crumbling laboratory, Caesar's desperate act of vengeance thwarts Joker's plan to forever silence his enemies!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Critical Situation! Punk Hazard Explodes!

programme.title: Franky continues his battle with Buffalo and Baby 5, Nami uses a mighty gust of wind to save the children from a deadly cloud of gas, and Usopp takes a shot at capturing Caesar!
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: A dragon regains his boyish form, a noble warrior once feared dead makes a shocking resurrection, and bitter enemies set aside their differences to enjoy a well-deserved feast!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Touching Reunion! Momonosuke and Kin'emon!

programme.title: The weary marines and the rescued children get teary-eyed as they say goodbye to the Straw Hats. Meanwhile, Law enters into treacherous negotiations with Joker!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: It's Time to Say Goodbye! Leaving Punk Hazard!

programme.title: Mad Max, (1980, Action)
programme.desc: Max and the gang's worlds converge when the gang wants Max as badly as he wants them, especially after they target him for the death of their former leader.

programme.title: Source Code, (2011, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Jake Gyllenhaal stars in this action thriller about a man who awakens in another man’s body to discover only he has the ability to stop a terrorist attack on a commuter train.

programme.title: Hansel and Gretel: Witch Hunters, (2013, Action)
programme.desc: Get ready for a twisted take on the classic tale as Hansel and Gretel have turned pro, coping with the trauma of their childhood captivity by slaying witches for hire.

programme.title: War of the Worlds, (2005, Action)
programme.desc: A contemporary retelling of H.G.Wells' classic, the sci-fi thriller reveals the extraordinary battle for the future of humankind through the eyes of one American family.

programme.title: Overlord, (2018, Action)
programme.desc: Nothing can prepare you for the mind-blowing mayhem that is Overlord. Mega producer J.J. Abrams creates an insanely twisted thrill ride about a team of American troops who come face-to-face with Nazi super-soldiers unlike the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Attack the Block, (2011, Science fiction)
programme.desc: ATTACK THE BLOCK is a fast, funny, frightening action adventure movie that pits a teen street gang against an invasion of savage alien monsters. It turns a crazy mix of tough street kids into a team of kick ass heroes.

programme.title: The Mortal Instruments, (2013, Fantasy)
programme.desc: Clary's life is turned upside down when her mother is kidnapped and it's revealed that they are shadowhunters who are tasked with protecting the world from vampires, werewolves and demons. Clary must discover her talents and save her mother.

programme.title: Overlord, (2018, Action)
programme.desc: Nothing can prepare you for the mind-blowing mayhem that is Overlord. Mega producer J.J. Abrams creates an insanely twisted thrill ride about a team of American troops who come face-to-face with Nazi super-soldiers unlike the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Ghost Rider: Spirit of Vengeance, (2012, Action)
programme.desc: Johnny Blaze, aka Ghost Rider, is now hiding out in remote Eastern Europe, struggling to repress his curse. Blaze is recruited by a sect to take on the devil, who wants to take over his mortal son's body on the kid's birthday.

programme.title: Paint Your Wagon, (1970, Drama)
programme.desc: A Michigan farmer and a prospector form a partnership in the California gold country. Their adventures include buying and sharing a wife...

programme.title: Fort Defiance, (1951, Drama)
programme.desc: A former Civil War solider bent on killing the man whose surrender got his brother killed, later finds out a rancher wants that same man and his blind brother killed.

programme.title: The Broken Star, (1956, Drama)
programme.desc: A marshal murders a rancher for gold, but is foiled by his assistant.

programme.title: Cariboo Trail, (1950, Drama)
programme.desc: Montanans Jim Redfern and Mike Evans head into Canada's British Columbia via the Cariboo Trail intent to raise cattle and dig for gold but find trouble instead.

programme.title: The White Buffalo, (1977, Drama)
programme.desc: Charles Bronson and Will Sampson star as Wild Bill Hickok and Chief Crazy Horse in this one-of-a-kind western that finds both western legends braving the snowy wilderness in search of the demon that haunts them both, the fabled White Buffalo!

programme.title: The Alamo, (1960, Drama)
programme.desc: John Wayne produces, directs and stars in this retelling of the Alamo, a battle in which 185 men joined together against an army of 7,000. Filmed entirely in Texas, "The Alamo" is a visually stunning and historically accurate celebration of courage.

programme.title: Support Your Local Sheriff!, (1969, Drama)
programme.desc: James Garner stars in this rollicking western spoof that has him taking on the job of a frontier town sheriff who must fend off villains (led by Walter Brennen) from every direction...all without breaking a sweat or dirtying his shiny black boots!

programme.title: Support Your Local Gunfighter, (1971, Drama)
programme.desc: James Garner is back in the saddle again as hustler Latigo Smith whose latest con is passing off cowhand Jug (Jack Elam) as the dreaded gunman Swifty Morgan. But when the real Swifty shows up, the Wild West is going to get a whole lot wackier!

programme.title: Man From Del Rio, (1956, Drama)
programme.desc: When a Mexican gunslinger rids a town of several notorious gunfighters, he is named the sheriff, but must win over the rest of the residents who are yet to warm to his hard-hitting ways.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement, (2000, Action)
programme.desc: Colonel Terry Childers is a patriot and war hero. But when a peacekeeping mission he leads in Yemen goes terribly wrong, he finds himself facing a court-martial.

programme.title: Disturbia, (2007, Drama)
programme.desc: Living under three months' house arrest, Kale Brecht (Shia LaBeouf, Transformers) passes his days spying on the neighbors. It's all fun and games until things take a horrifying turn for the worse.

programme.title: Eagle Eye, (2008, Action)
programme.desc: Shia LaBeouf and Michelle Monaghan star as two strangers trying to escape danger when they are ripped from their ordinary lives and 'activated' as part of a hightech assassination plot.

programme.title: Rules of Engagement, (2000, Action)
programme.desc: Colonel Terry Childers is a patriot and war hero. But when a peacekeeping mission he leads in Yemen goes terribly wrong, he finds himself facing a court-martial.

programme.title: The Tailor of Panama, (2001, Thriller)
programme.desc: Based on the 1996 novel, this is a mixture of thriller and black comedy. Harry Pendel is the tailor to the powerful of Panama. Harry is known for his storytelling and suits, but soon his tales carry lethal repercussions.

programme.title: There Will Be Blood, (2007, Drama)
programme.desc: A sprawling epic about family, faith, power and oil. The story chronicles the life of Daniel Plainview, who transforms himself from a down-and-out silver miner into a self-made oil tycoon.

programme.title: Flags of Our Fathers, (2006, Drama)
programme.desc: From Academy Award-winning director Clint Eastwood and Academy Award-winner Steven Spielberg, comes the life stories of the six men who raised the flag at The Battle of Iwo Jima, a turning point in WWII.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Minako and Makoto compete to win the heart of Honjo, a young principal. But their rivalry starts to put a strain on their friendship.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Chibi-Usa’s school is having a sports day. However, one of its main events is jumping over the vaulting box, which Chibi-Usa is not very good at.
programme.sub-title: Overcome Your Fear: The Jump to Freedom

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Chibi-Usa and Usagi befriend a young painter named Kamoi at the park. Kamoi is visited by Cere-Cere, who asks the man to paint a portrait of her.
programme.sub-title: Don't Lose Sight of Your Dreams: The Mirror of Truth

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Chibi-Usa is curious to know why Pegasus is reluctant to tell her where he came from. When she confronts Pegasus with the question, he disappears.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Palla-Pall turns Sailor Chibi Moon into an adult and Sailor Moon into a child. Chibi-Usa turns into shock when Pegasus can no longer hear her.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The girls begin to suspect that Chibi-Usa is in love. Eager to know who the boy is, they try to get Chibi-Usa to talk, but with little success.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and her friends help set up the stage for the Coming of Age Day ceremony. They befriend four girls who are actually the Amazoness Quartet.
programme.sub-title: Dream to be an Adult: The Amazoness' Confusion

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Strange spider webs begin to appear all across the Juban District. The girls notice that these webs are all originating from the Dead Moon Circus.
programme.sub-title: Terror in Motion: The Dark Queen's Evil Hand

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Nehelenia sets her plan in motion by starting a solar eclipse that will leave the world in eternal darkness.
programme.sub-title: The Source of Darkness: Dead Moon Circus

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The Dead Moon discovers that Sailor Chibi Moon was hiding Pegasus and captures her. Sailor Chibi Moon learns the history behind the Dead Moon's queen.
programme.sub-title: Labyrinth of Mirrors: Chibi Moon Captured

programme.desc: Nehelenia demands that Helios give up the Golden Crystal in exchange for Sailor Chibi Moon. The Sailor Guardians are struggling to defeat Zirconia.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Nehelenia regains her full power and proceeds to put the world into an eternal slumber.Sailor Moon tries to activate the power of the Golden Crystal.

programme.desc: The Golden Crystal’s power defeats Nehelenia, pushing her back into the abyss. Nehelenia tries to take Sailor Chibi Moon with her.
programme.sub-title: Dreams Forever: Fill the Heavens with Light

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and her friends start their new lives as high school girls. Nehalennia breaks out of her prison to seek revenge against the Sailor Guardians.
programme.sub-title: The Flower of Nightmares Scatters: The Queen of Darkness Returns

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Hotaru starts to age at an accelerated rate, from a baby to a young girl within days. She warns of coming danger that will soon befall Sailor Moon.
programme.sub-title: Saturn Awakens: The Ten Sailor Guardians Unite

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The city is being plagued by a strange illness that causes people to become obsessed with staring into the mirror for hours, even days.
programme.sub-title: The Cursed Mirror: Mamoru Caught in a Nightmare

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Sailor Moon is left devastated after seeing Mamoru get abducted To make matters worse, Nehalennia’s action is starting to cause a time paradox.
programme.sub-title: Night of Destiny: The Sailor Guardians' Ordeals

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Sailor Moon runs off to save Mamoru from Nehalennia. The rest of the Sailor Guardians try to go after her, but they fall victim to Nehalennia’s traps.
programme.sub-title: For Love: The Endless Battle in the Dark World

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Sailor Chibi Moon and Sailor Saturn make it to Nehalennia’s palace, where Mamoru is being held prisoner. The two Guardians are unable to free him.

programme.desc: Mamoru tells Usagi that he’s accepted an offer to study abroad in the U.S., which will force them to have a long-distance relationship.

programme.desc: Usagi runs into Seiya and is annoyed by his cocky attitude. The next day, Seiya and the rest of Three Lights have transferred to her school.

programme.desc: Minako decides to work for the Three Lights as their personal assistant. But Minako soon realizes that being a star is not all fun and glamor.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The Three Lights are rehearsing for their upcoming musical. But they seem to have a hard time winning the approval of the stage director.
programme.sub-title: Fighter's Secret Identity: The Shocking Super Transformation

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Ami invites Taiki to come and watch the Wataru’s Comet pass by Earth with their science teacher Amanogawa, only to be rejected.
programme.sub-title: A Star of Dreams and Wishes: Taiki's Transformation

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and the girls are searching for Luna, who has gone missing. To their surprise, they find Luna being introduced on TV as Yaten’s pet cat.
programme.sub-title: Luna's Discovery: The Real Face of Yaten

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Taiki asks Makoto to appear on a cooking show with him. Usagi decides to tag along, but her clumsiness creates a huge mess at the TV studio.

programme.desc: Usagi and the girls try to buy tickets to a Three Lights concert. Michiru gives them the tickets, revealing that she will be preforming.

programme.desc: Seiya asks Usagi out on a date, to which she agrees. Sailor Iron Mouse attempts to make up for her recent failures by going after Seiya’s star seed.

programme.desc: Usagi and Luna encounter a girl who appears to be lost. The two are surprised to find the same girl now living in Usagi’s house as her younger sister.

programme.title: Queenpins, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: A housewife and her friend hatch an illegal coupon-club scheme that scams millions from corporations and delivers deals to the public. Hot on their trail is an unlikely duo -- a hapless loss-prevention officer and a determined U.S. postal inspector.

programme.title: Life of Crime, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: Double-crosses and plot twists abound when a corrupt real-estate developer (Tim Robbins) decides not to pay a ransom to his wife's (Jennifer Aniston) kidnappers (John Hawkes, Yasiin Bey).

programme.title: One Day as a Lion, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: Jackie Powers is a nice guy but a lousy hit man who takes a waitress hostage after a job goes bad. When Jackie reveals he needs money to get his son out of jail, she cooks up a scheme for them to get cash from her dying mother.

programme.title: War on Everyone, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: Two corrupt cops, who make money blackmailing criminals, come up against one who may be far more dangerous than both of them.

programme.title: Mad Money, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: Three women (Diane Keaton, Queen Latifah, Katie Holmes) conspire to steal a pile of cash that the Federal Reserve Bank has earmarked for destruction.

programme.title: Queenpins, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: A housewife and her friend hatch an illegal coupon-club scheme that scams millions from corporations and delivers deals to the public. Hot on their trail is an unlikely duo -- a hapless loss-prevention officer and a determined U.S. postal inspector.

programme.title: Life of Crime, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: Double-crosses and plot twists abound when a corrupt real-estate developer (Tim Robbins) decides not to pay a ransom to his wife's (Jennifer Aniston) kidnappers (John Hawkes, Yasiin Bey).

programme.title: One Day as a Lion, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: Jackie Powers is a nice guy but a lousy hit man who takes a waitress hostage after a job goes bad. When Jackie reveals he needs money to get his son out of jail, she cooks up a scheme for them to get cash from her dying mother.

programme.title: War on Everyone, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: Two corrupt cops, who make money blackmailing criminals, come up against one who may be far more dangerous than both of them.

programme.desc: In the waning days of Prohibition, Sugar Ray and his adopted son, Quick, run a speakeasy called Club Sugar Ray. Gangster Bugsy Calhoune pays corrupt cop Phil Cantone to close Club Sugar Ray down.

programme.title: Donnie Darko (Theatrical Cut), (2001, Science fiction)
programme.desc: After narrowly escaping a bizarre accident, a troubled teenager is plagued by visions of a man in a large rabbit suit who manipulates him to commit a series of crimes.

programme.title: Bandits, (2001, Comedy)
programme.desc: The suave Joe and his hypochondriac partner Terry have escaped from prison. Cutting a swath from Oregon through California, these fugitives rob banks in order to finance their scheme for a new life south of the Border.

programme.title: The Gift, (2000, Thriller)
programme.desc: Widow and mother of three, Annie Wilson makes her living by foretelling others' futures...though her own has become cloudier than even she can see.

programme.title: I'm Not There, (2007, Drama)
programme.desc: The life of Bob Dylan is examined through multiple variations of his own personality and career, as played by a series of different actors.

programme.title: The Monuments Men, (2014, Action)

programme.desc: 2023. Freddy é o herdeiro de uma família de lobisomens e tem certeza que vai virar um lobo incrível. Mas algo dá errado em sua primeira tranformação e ele vira um feroz poodle. Agora ele precisa provar que ainda é 100% lobo, apesar da aparência fofinha. programme.title: O Menino e o Urso, (2014)

Gêneros: Children & Family Elenco: Mathias Malzieu, Olivia Ruiz, Grand Corps Malade Diretor: Mathias Malzieu, Stéphane Berla

programme.title: O Reino dos Elfos, (2017)

programme.title: Transmissões Sinistras, (1970)

programme.title: O Acerto, (1970)

Ryan é forçado a recorrer a medidas extremas e rever um passado obscuro. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.desc: 1970. Uma turma de jovens vai para as montanhas com a intenção de esquiar e se divertir. Tudo vai bem até que um deles acaba quebrando a perna. O grupo começa a procurar ajuda na afastada região e encontra um hotel abandonado. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Double Dragon, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Jimmy e Billy se reencontram após serem separados no nascimento. Billy decide abrir uma escola de artes matrimoniais para ensinar as crianças locais, mas é atacado pelo chefe das sombras, que é seu irmão. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Jacob's Cross, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. A jornada de um homem para construir o próximo grande império petrolífero sul-africano. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Jacob's Cross, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Abayomi revela à sua filha que Jacob também é seu filho; Abayomi decide deixar Lagos; Jacob vai para a prisão com sua mãe para dar as boas-vindas ao seu irmão Andile. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Jacob's Cross, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Lerato está grávida; Prospero não gosta da proposta de Abayomi, o que cria rivalidade entre ele e Jacob; Thembi perdoa Jacob pela sua colaboração com Abayomi; Jacob e Lerato se casam. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Runtime, (2026)
programme.desc: 2026. no info available Gêneros: no info available

programme.title: Bons pra Cachorro, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Almôndega e Cassie, dois cães de estimação, precisam superar suas diferenças para evitar que ladrões assaltem a casa dos seus donos. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: O Resgate da Princesa, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Ruslan, um artista sonha em se tornar um cavaleiro, se apaixona por Mila. A felicidade deles não dura muito tempo. Chernomor, o malvado feiticeiro, rouba Mila diante dos olhos de Ruslan para transformar seu poder de amor em seu próprio poder mágico. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Muito Bem Acompanhada, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Para fazer ciúmes ao ex-namorado e forjar uma vida romântica de sucesso, uma mulher contrata um garoto de programa para acompanhá-la ao casamento de sua irmã mais nova em Londres. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Meu Trabalho É um Parto, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Desesperada, Thea finge estar grávida para não perder o emprego. O único problema é que a gravidez é uma mentira e agora ela precisa fazer de tudo para convencer a todos de que realmente está esperando um bebê. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: O Rei da Montanha, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Espen Ash Lad, filho de um pobre agricultor, embarca em uma missão perigosa com seus irmãos para salvar a princesa de um vilão conhecido como o Rei da Montanha. O objetivo é ganhar uma recompensa e salvar a fazenda da sua família da ruína. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Entre Amigos, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. No Queens, um grupo prepara uma despedida de solteiro para seu amigo de infância, Ray. No entanto, o noivo anda tendo dúvidas e não tem certeza se haverá casamento. Durante a festa, há descobertas para a maioria deles. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Adorável Professora, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma professora reencontra seu antigo aluno, Jason, que sonha em ser autor de teatro. Para ajudá-lo, Linda resolve encenar a peça escrita por ele na escola em que trabalha. A parti daí, ela começa a perceber que sente algo mais por Jason. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: A Química do Amor, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma dedicada cientista, determinada a resolver a guerra dos sexos, arrisca sua própria felicidade para provar que a ciência explica tudo. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Filha de Deus, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O detetive Scott Galban busca a verdade sobre a misteriosa morte de seu parceiro. Enquanto isso, Isabel de la Cruz, uma mulher local que diz ter sido testemunha de um milagre, começa a vivenciar estranhos acontecimentos. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: A Última Jornada, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Com o fim do mundo se aproximando, uma mãe prestes a morrer envia seu filho a uma jornada a um lugar místico que realiza desejos, na esperança que ele possa salvar o mundo. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: O Dono da Festa, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Van Wilder ficou famoso na cidade por organizar as melhores festas da faculdade. Porém, o veterano é forçado a mudar sua rotina de sete anos após perder a mesada do pai, deixando as festividades com os dias contados. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Entrando numa Roubada, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Vitor vence um concurso de roteiros e ganha como prêmio R$ 100 mil para produzir um filme. Ele procura seus antigos colegas para participar de "Aceleração Máxima", que conta com assaltos a postos de gasolina, tiros e perseguições no enredo. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: O Reino Gelado 3 - Fogo e Gelo, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O raro talento de se meter em problemas é o legado da família de Kai e Gerda. Crescidos, os irmãos se metem em um desastre de proporções globais, tudo para encontrar seus pais que estão desaparecidos após serem levados pelo Vento do Norte. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: 1988. Issamu está desesperadamente em busca de Hitomi, que foi levada para o Mundo Kaima. O que o aguarda lá é uma perigosa armadilha criada por Maribaron. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Tetsuo Kurata, Go Inoue, Atsuko Takahata Diretor: Masao Minowa
programme.desc: Kamen Rider Black RX - T01E15

programme.title: 1988. Um homem misterioso surge diante de Issamu, que está em busca de Hitomi. Ele se chama Joe Kazumi, que fugiu do Império Crisis. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Tetsuo Kurata, Go Inoue, Atsuko Takahata Diretor: Masao Minowa
programme.sub-title: A Princesa do Vale dos Milagres

programme.title: 1988. Issamu, Joe e Shigeru são capturados e levados para o templo da Princesa Garonia. Maribaron ordena que Joe e Shigeru sejam eliminados. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Tetsuo Kurata, Go Inoue, Atsuko Takahata Diretor: Masao Minowa
programme.desc: Kamen Rider Black RX - T01E17

programme.title: 1988. Shigeru quer observar esquilos-voadores que atingem 10 mil metros de altura no céu. Porém, um esquilo em específico chama a atenção de Issamu e Joe. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Tetsuo Kurata, Go Inoue, Atsuko Takahata Diretor: Masao Minowa
programme.desc: Kamen Rider Black RX - T01E18

programme.title: 1988. Nascem dois sóis em Tóquio, mais uma operação maléfica em movimento pelo Império Crisis. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Tetsuo Kurata, Go Inoue, Atsuko Takahata Diretor: Masao Minowa
programme.desc: Kamen Rider Black RX - T01E19

programme.title: 1988. Bancos são roubados e uma única prova do crime intriga a polícia: cascos de bananas. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Tetsuo Kurata, Go Inoue, Atsuko Takahata Diretor: Masao Minowa

programme.title: 1985. O cozinheiro espacial Bragul e Macgaren se unem para raptar Miya e atrair Jaspion para uma emboscada. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Kei Anan, Misa Nirei, Isao Sasaki, Hiroshi Watari Diretor: Toshiaki Kobayashi, Akihira Tojo

programme.title: 1985. Miki é uma menina com poderes sobrenaturais. Resgatada por Macgaren de um desmoronamento ela é pressionada a ajudá-lo. programme.desc: Naruto: Byakugan Contra O Jutsu Clones Das Sombras! - T01E60

programme.title: 2020. Naruto não consegue usar o Jutsu Clones das Sombras contra Neji que consegue ver seu pontos de chacra! Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Derradeira Defesa : No Ponto Zero!
programme.desc: Naruto: A Derradeira Defesa : No Ponto Zero! - T01E61

programme.title: 2020. A batalha entre Naruto e Neji continua, e Neji demonstra seu enorme poder. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Verdadeiro Poder Do Fracassado! - T01E62

programme.title: 2020. Derrotado por Naruto, Neji é levado para o hospital, quando o tio de Neji, Hiashi, aparece. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Bata Ou Desista ! As Rodadas Finais Ficam Complicadas!
programme.desc: Naruto: Bata Ou Desista ! As Rodadas Finais Ficam Complicadas! - T01E63

programme.title: 2020. A luta de Sasuke é adiada. É a vez de Shikamaru, mas ele não tem vontade de lutar por pensar que a luta dele seja apenas um combate secundário… Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Motivação Zero : O Cara Com Inveja Da Nuvem
programme.desc: Naruto: Motivação Zero : O Cara Com Inveja Da Nuvem - T01E64

programme.title: 2020. Na luta entre Shikamaru e Temari, Shikamaru que tem a vantagem faz uma decisão surpreendente. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Folha Dançante, Areia Contorcida - T01E65

programme.title: 2020. A luta antecipada de Sasuke e Gaara começa. Gaara sinistramente fala com si mesmo, como se estivesse falando com outra pessoa. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Jutsu Do Sobrancelhudo ... Stilo Sasuke! - T01E66

programme.title: 2020. Os movimentos e a velocidade de Sasuke são idênticas ao taijustu de Lee. Mas Gaara não é um oponente que pode ser derrotado somente por taijutsu. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: “Atrasado Para O Show, Mas Pronto Para Lutar ...A Derradeira Técnica Secreta Nasce!"
programme.desc: Naruto: “Atrasado Para O Show, Mas Pronto Para Lutar ...A Derradeira Técnica Secreta Nasce!" - T01E67

programme.title: 2020. Durante o combate, alguém usou genjutsu para que todos na arena caíssem no sono. Os ninjas da Areia, liderados por Orochimaru, começaram seu plano para destruir a Aldeia Oculta da Folha. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Zero Hora! A Destruição Da Aldeia Da Folha Começa !
programme.desc: Naruto: Zero Hora! A Destruição Da Aldeia Da Folha Começa ! - T01E68

programme.title: 2020. Os ninjas do Som e da Areia, juntos com Orochimaru, começaram a destruir a Aldeia Oculta da Folha. A arena se tornou em um campo de batalha. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Aldeia Em Angústia: Uma Nova Missão Nível “A” !
programme.desc: Naruto: Aldeia Em Angústia: Uma Nova Missão Nível “A” ! - T01E69

programme.title: 2020. Junto com Pakkun, Naruto, Sakura e Shikamaru estão em busca de Sasuke. Pakkun sente nove dos homens de Orochimaru vindo por eles. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Umociosoéposto Em Ação ... Chega De Preguiça !
programme.desc: Naruto: Umociosoéposto Em Ação ... Chega De Preguiça ! - T01E70

programme.title: 2020. Orochimaru prende o Hokage dentro de uma barreira e continuam batalhando. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Uma luta incomparável, Hokage Contra Hokage!
programme.desc: Naruto: Uma luta incomparável, Hokage Contra Hokage! - T01E71

programme.title: 2020. Sasuke finalmente alcança Gaara, Temari e Kankuro. Kankuro escapa com Gaara, deixando Temari para encarar Sasuke. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Um Erro Do Passado ... Um Rosto Revelado !
programme.desc: Naruto: Um Erro Do Passado ... Um Rosto Revelado ! - T01E72

programme.title: 2020. A intensa batalha entre Orochimaru e o Hokage continua. Finalmente, o Hokage decide usar um jutsu que Orochimaru não conhece, o Jutsu de Selamanto conhecido como Selo Ceifeiro da Morte. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Técnica Secreta Proibida ... Selo Ceifeiro Da Morte !
programme.desc: Naruto: Técnica Secreta Proibida ... Selo Ceifeiro Da Morte ! - T01E73

programme.title: 2020. Shino aparece durante a batalha de Sasuke e Kankuro. Shino encara Kankura, permitindo que Sasuke vá atrás de Gaara. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Uma Verdade Surpreendente: A Identidade Do Gaara Aparece!
programme.desc: Naruto: Uma Verdade Surpreendente: A Identidade Do Gaara Aparece! - T01E74

programme.title: 2020. Metade do corpo de Gaara se transformou, e Sasuke continua lutando com ele. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Decisão De Sasuke: Pressionado Ao Extremo!
programme.desc: Naruto: A Decisão De Sasuke: Pressionado Ao Extremo! - T01E75

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e Sakura conseguem alcançar Sasuke que está desmaiado e sem força. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Assassino Da Noite Enluarada - T01E76

programme.title: 2020. Naruto é incapaz de lutar contra o poder imenso de Gaara. Enquanto Naruto declara que ele luta por seus companheiros, Gaara fala que ele luta por si. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Luz Contra Escuridão ...Os Dois Rostos De Gaara !
programme.desc: Naruto: Luz Contra Escuridão ...Os Dois Rostos De Gaara ! - T01E77

programme.title: 2020. Naruto é incapaz de lutar contra a força incrível de Gaara. Entretanto, depois de ver Sasuke arriscando a vida para salvar ele e Sakura... Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Manual Do Ninja Naruto!Pode Crer ! - T01E78

programme.title: 2020. Gaara realiza o Jutsu Fingindo de Morto, que permite o Espírito da Areia dentro dele, Shukako, a revelar o seu verdadeiro poder. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Além Do Limite Da Escuridão E Luz!
programme.desc: Naruto: Além Do Limite Da Escuridão E Luz! - T01E79

programme.title: 2020. Usando toda a força possível, Gaara e Naruto continuam lutando. Determinado a proteger Sakura, Naruto ataca Gaara continuamente. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Terceiro Hokage,Para Sempre. - T01E80

programme.title: 2020. O plano de Orochimaru para destruir a Aldeia Oculta da Folha é interrompido. Mas o dano é muito, e o trabalho para reparar começa. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Retorno Da Névoa Matutina - T01E81

programme.title: 2020. Kakashi chega na última hora para ajudar Asuma e Kurenai. Itachi também entra na briga. A batalha entre os dois usuários do Sharingan começa. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Olho No Olho : Sharingan Contra Sharingan!
programme.desc: Naruto: Olho No Olho : Sharingan Contra Sharingan! - T01E82

programme.title: 2020. Jiraiya e Naruto estão numa jornada em busca de Tsunade, uma dos lendários Sannin. O objetivo de Jiraiya é treinar Naruto e protegê-lo das garras da misteriosa organização, Akatsuki. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Jiraiya: O Potencial Desastre Do Naruto!
programme.desc: Naruto: Jiraiya: O Potencial Desastre Do Naruto! - T01E83

programme.title: 2020. Com a intenção de enfrentar Itachi, Sasuke vai à aldeia onde Naruto está ficando. No caminho, memórias trágicas do passado vêm à tona. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Ruja Chidori ! Irmão Contra Irmão! - T01E84

programme.title: 2020. Jiraiya salva Naruto de Kisame bem a tempo. E parece que Itachi e a organização Akatsuki estão definitivamente atrás de Naruto para obter o poder da Raposa de Nova Caudas. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Ódio Entre Os Uchiha : O Último Do Clã!
programme.desc: Naruto: Ódio Entre Os Uchiha : O Último Do Clã! - T01E85

programme.title: 2020. Ferido mentalmente e fisicamente, Sasuke é levado à Aldeia Oculta da Folha por Guy. Mas a especialista médica, Tsunade, não está presente… Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Um Novo Treinamento Começa! Eu Serei Forte!
programme.desc: Naruto: Um Novo Treinamento Começa! Eu Serei Forte! - T01E86

programme.title: 2020. Naruto finalmente começa o treinamento com Jiraiya. A técnica que ele aprende é a marca do Quarto Hokage, um gênio que levou três anos para realmente controlá-la. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Treinamento Continua: Estoure O Balão Da Água!
programme.desc: Naruto: O Treinamento Continua: Estoure O Balão Da Água! - T01E87

programme.title: 2020. Naruto termina o primeiro passo do treinamento. Mas o próximo passo, fazer com que uma bola de borracha se exploda com chacra, torna-se ser extremamente difícil. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Ponto Focal: A Marca Da Folha!
programme.desc: Naruto: Ponto Focal: A Marca Da Folha! - T01E88

programme.title: 2020. Orochimaru e Kabuto aparecem de repente diante de Tsunade e Shizune que estavam passeando. Orochimaru, ferido pelo Selo Ceifeiro da Morte do Terceiro Hokage, procura por assistência médica do prévio Sannin. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Uma Escolha Impossível: A Dor Dentro Do Coração De Tsunade
programme.desc: Naruto: Uma Escolha Impossível: A Dor Dentro Do Coração De Tsunade - T01E89

programme.title: 2020. Para curar seus braços, Orochimaru oferece trazer de volta à vida o irmão mais novo de Tsunade e Dan, o amor dela. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Imperdoável!Uma Total Falta De Respeito! - T01E90

programme.title: 2020. Naruto fica furioso pelo jeito que Tsunade desrespeita a posição do Hokage e a desafia a uma luta. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Herança!O Colar Da Morte! - T01E91

programme.title: 2020. Naruto pratica duro para ganhar o colar de Tsunade. Enquanto isso, Tsunade está incerta sobre o acordo de Orochimaru. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Uma Oferta Duvidosa!A Escolha De Tsunade!
programme.desc: Naruto: Uma Oferta Duvidosa!A Escolha De Tsunade! - T01E92

programme.title: 2020. Com o desejo de ver Nawaki e Dan, Tsunade quase aceita o acordo tentador de Orochimaru. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Interrupção ... O Acordo Acabou ! - T01E93

programme.title: 2020. Orochimaru e Kabuto usam um jutsu de invocação para chamar uma cobra gigante. Ainda drogado e incapaz de usar seu chacra, Jiraiya invoca o pequeno Gamakichi. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Atacar! A Fúria Do Rasengan! - T01E94

programme.title: 2020. Um ninja como Naruto nunca volta atrás na sua palavra. Naruto é seriamente ferido por Kabuto e está à beira da morte. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Quinto Hokage ... Apostando A Vida
programme.desc: Naruto: O Quinto Hokage ... Apostando A Vida - T01E95

programme.title: 2020. Jiraiya, Tsunade e Orochimaru soltam um jutsu de invocação. Uma batalha intensa começa. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Paralisação Completa !O Fim Do Sannin! - T01E96

programme.title: 2020. Tsunade, Naruto e os outros começam a voltar à Aldeia da Folha, onde Tsunade se tornará oficialmente no Quinto Hokage. Tsunade pede para parar num aldeia com fontes termais. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Seqüestrado!A Aventura De Naruto Nas Fontes Termais
programme.desc: Naruto: Seqüestrado!A Aventura De Naruto Nas Fontes Termais - T01E97

programme.title: 2020. Naruto pede a Tsunade curar Sasuke e Lee antes dela se tornar no Hokage. Após examinar Lee, ela diz a ele que encontre outro caminho que não seja de um shinobi. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Aviso De Tsunade: Ninja Nunca Mais!
programme.desc: Naruto: O Aviso De Tsunade: Ninja Nunca Mais! - T01E98

programme.title: 2020. Tsunade pergunta a Lee se ele quer desistir do caminho de um ninja ou ter uma cirurgia arriscada, com apenas 50% de chance de ser bem-sucedida. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Vontade De Fogo Ainda Queima!
programme.desc: Naruto: A Vontade De Fogo Ainda Queima! - T01E99

programme.title: 2020. Tsunade aconselha a Lee que desista do caminho de um shinobi, e Lee relembra do seu primeiro encontro com seu professor, Guy. Incapaz de dominar nenhum ninjutsu ou genjutsu, Lee sempre foi desprezado pelos outros. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Sensei E O Aluno: O Laço Dos Shinobi!
programme.desc: Naruto: Sensei E O Aluno: O Laço Dos Shinobi! - T01E100

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e sua equipe sempre quiseram ver o rosto por trás da máscara de Kakashi. Os três fazem de tudo para ver. Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Fame: A Temptations Story
programme.desc: Despite sibling rivalry, the Jordan sisters, Cherish and Roxy, remain the hottest singing duo on the charts. When their penthouse becomes the target of a jewel heist, rumors start to spread that Roxy secretly planned and staged the crime. Starring Keri Hilson, Keisha Chante, Nathan Witte.

programme.title: Exhibiting Forgiveness
programme.desc: A Black artist finds his path to success derailed by an unexpected visit from his estranged father, a recovering addict desperate to reconcile. Together, they learn that forgetting might be harder than forgiving. Starring André Holland, John Earl Jelks, Andra Day.

programme.title: Match, Meet, Murder
programme.desc: Diving into the world of dating apps, a lingerie designer meets a handsome stranger who's smart, successful, and a former contestant on a dating show. However, she soon learns that the show wasn't the only secret he failed to mention in his profile. Starring Stephanie Sy, Jacob Blair, Erik Athavale.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers
programme.desc: A husband and wife take a cruise to celebrate their good luck in business, but their luck takes a turn at the apex of their journey, with many wondering what happened aboard the ship.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Killers
programme.desc: Newlyweds board a cruise ship, but things take a turn for the worse when one disappears in the middle of the night; a blood stained canopy is all the only sign of a young man's fate; leaving many more questions than answers to what happened.

programme.title: Almost Unsolved Heists
programme.desc: When a retired city bureaucrat turned bank robber is finally arrested, a long distance friend is stunned to see his familiar face online in connection with a high-speed chase and a string of armed bank robberies.

programme.title: Charmed to Death
programme.desc: When a student meets an esteemed psychologist, she's certain she's found her soul mate; when he suddenly disappears, she discovers he has been living a bizarre double life in Detroit's most notorious neighborhood.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: On the outskirts of Nashville, Mich., Rodney Fancher's bullet-ridden body is found in a ditch; the hunt for a killer begins, pulling in police forces from across the state; as the case starts to turn cold, a startling confession emerges.

programme.title: Stockholm Bloodbath
programme.desc: A ruthless political struggle between Sweden and Denmark turns bloody under the tyranny of the mad King Christian II. Caught up in this deadly war, two sisters seek revenge on the men who brutally murdered their family. Starring Sophie Cookson, Claes Bang, Alba August.

programme.title: McVeigh
programme.desc: After the deadly siege in Waco, Texas, U.S. Army veteran Timothy McVeigh hatches a sinister plan to blow up the Alfred P. Murrah Federal Building in Oklahoma City. Starring Alfie Allen, Brett Gelman, Ashley Benson.

programme.desc: Marty McFly must travel through time and make sure his parents meet and fall in love, or he'll never be born.

programme.title: Bill & Ted's Excellent Adventure (1989)
programme.desc: Two dopey dudes (Keanu Reeves, Alex Winter) go back in time to fetch Beethoven, Napoleon and other biggies for a history project.

programme.title: Bill & Ted's Bogus Journey (1991)
programme.desc: The dopey dudes (Keanu Reeves, Alex Winter) beat the Grim Reaper (William Sadler) in a board-game contest, so he must help them stop their evil robot twins.

programme.title: Lenny (1974)
programme.desc: 1950s comic Lenny Bruce (Dustin Hoffman) spurs controversy with his drug use, graphic language and marriage to a stripper (Valerie Perrine).

programme.title: Roman Holiday (1953)
programme.desc: A young princess (Audrey Hepburn), tired of her constraints, runs off with a U.S. newsman (Gregory Peck) in Rome.

programme.title: Comes a Horseman (1978)
programme.desc: A rancher (James Caan) back from World War II helps a woman (Jane Fonda) fight a cattle baron (Jason Robards) who wants their Colorado land.

programme.title: Marathon Man (1976)
programme.desc: The CIA and a Nazi death-camp dentist (Laurence Olivier) chase a New York graduate student (Dustin Hoffman).

programme.title: Lifeguard (1976)
programme.desc: A 30-ish beach bum (Sam Elliott) feels like a failure after seeing his old girlfriend (Anne Archer) at a high-school reunion.

programme.title: The Rage: Carrie 2 (1999)
programme.desc: After her best friend commits suicide, an unpopular girl (Emily Bergl) discovers she has telekinetic powers and uses them to seek revenge on her humiliators.

programme.title: Stargate (1994)
programme.desc: A portal takes an Egyptologist (James Spader), a colonel (Kurt Russell) and a team of soldiers to another planet with pyramids, slaves and an alien ruler.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible (1996)
programme.desc: Branded a traitor, an elite intelligence agent (Tom Cruise) investigates a failed Prague mission to retrieve a computer disk.

programme.title: Contact (1997)
programme.desc: A scientist seeks alien beings after receiving mysterious messages from deep space via radio telescope dishes.

programme.title: Transformers: The Last Knight (2017)
programme.desc: As war with the Transformers rages on, inventor Cade Yeager forms an unlikely alliance with Bumblebee, an English lord and an Oxford professor to save the planet.

programme.title: Afterburn (2025)
programme.desc: After a massive solar flare destroys the Eastern Hemisphere, a treasure hunter for hire ventures to Europe to retrieve the coveted Mona Lisa, only to learn that the world needs a hero more than it needs a painting.

programme.title: From
programme.desc: An ominous discovery puts Boyd and his trusted circle on high alert; Julie searches for a way to harness her newfound abilities and Sara is once again tortured by the voices in her head.

programme.title: Boomerang (1992)
programme.desc: A Manhattan playboy (Eddie Murphy) gets a new corporate boss (Robin Givens), and she treats him the way he has always treated women.

programme.title: Yours, Mine and Ours (1968)
programme.desc: A widow (Lucille Ball) with eight children meets, courts and weds a widowed Navy officer (Henry Fonda) with a brood of 10.

programme.title: Pocket Listing (2015)
programme.desc: When a power player and his sultry wife hire a disgraced property broker to discreetly market and sell their Malibu villa, double crosses, adultery, murder and revenge ensue.

programme.title: The Hospital (1971)
programme.desc: The suicidal chief surgeon (George C. Scott) of a New York hospital beds the daughter (Diana Rigg) of a mad patient (Barnard Hughes).

programme.title: Barbershop (2002)
programme.desc: The owner of a popular barbershop considers selling the place to a loan shark who wants to convert it into a strip club.

programme.title: Hair (1979)
programme.desc: An Oklahoman (John Savage) bound for Vietnam falls in love with a New York debutante (Beverly D'Angelo) and discovers the Age of Aquarius with hippies in Central Park.

programme.title: Missing in Action 2: The Beginning (1985)
programme.desc: An imprisoned U.S. colonel (Chuck Norris) fights the military overlord (Oh Soon-tek) of a slave-labor opium operation in Vietnam.

programme.title: Black Rain (1989)
programme.desc: Two New York police detectives (Michael Douglas, Andy Garcia) take an underworld upstart back to Osaka, Japan.

programme.title: Days of Thunder (1990)
programme.desc: An upstart stock-car driver goes to the edge for his manager, his brain-surgeon girlfriend and himself.

programme.title: Road House (1989)
programme.desc: Hired to tame a rowdy Missouri bar, a Ph.D. bouncer (Patrick Swayze) romances a doctor (Kelly Lynch) and tames the whole town.
